heading: Amazon
text: Click through to Amazon via our link before checking out. The PTA receives a percentage of your purchase at no extra expense to you.

heading: Mabel's Labels
text: Order personalized labels and the PTA earns a portion of your sale. Use our fundraiser link when you shop.

heading: ShopRite for My School
text: Register your ShopRite card with our school so your grocery purchases generate funds for PS5.

heading: Pediped
text: Shop for kids' shoes through Pediped and support the PTA. Registration required — contact us for the code.
